queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of the credit amount requested by the applicant to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the association between checking account status: no checking account and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: delay in paying off previous credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default linked to credit history: delay in paying off previous credits and increased credit risk.
